summary: Iteration 11 - UI Refinements verification complete. All 7 requested features verified working: No toggle 'Mostra solo Schemi Preferiti', preferiti-only list, separate add-to-preferiti control, compact segmented control panel, horizontal Tavolo/Stazione buttons, resize controls functional, export PNG/PDF working.
seed_data_creation: Event ID 3 used for testing (existing tavolo and stazione)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 11 UI refinements verified. Piantina control panel is now compact with segmented grid layout. Schema preferiti management has separate controls for add/remove.

1_no_toggle_mostra_solo_preferiti.details: No toggle 'Mostra solo Schemi Preferiti' found on page. Instead, shows static label 'Visualizzazione attiva: solo Schemi Preferiti'.

2_lista_copia_schema_solo_preferiti.details: First dropdown (copia-schema-select) displays only events in preferiti list. Empty if no preferiti added.

3_separate_aggiungi_preferito_control.details: Second dropdown (aggiungi-preferito-select) shows all eventi simili for adding to preferiti. 'Aggiungi Preferito' button adds selected event. 'Rimuovi Preferito' button removes from first dropdown selection.

4_compact_segmented_control_panel.details: Control panel (piantina-control-panel) contains grid-based segmented controls: core controls (Drag/Snap), massive resize (Tavoli/Stazioni +/-), selected resize (Tavolo Sel/Staz Sel +/-), and Reset dimensioni.

5_tavolo_stazione_horizontal_buttons.details: '+Tavolo' and '+Stazione' buttons are in grid-cols-2 layout, displayed side by side horizontally instead of vertically stacked.

6_resize_controls_functional.details: All resize controls clickable and functional: Tavoli +/-, Stazioni +/-, Tavolo Sel +/- (when selected), Staz Sel +/- (when selected), Reset dimensioni. Controls update canvas elements correctly.

7_export_png_pdf_buttons.details: PNG and PDF export buttons visible and enabled in header. Located at top-right alongside Stampa, Menu, and Salva buttons.

ui_verification.copia_schema_card: Card contains two rows: (1) evento reference select + Rimuovi Preferito + Copia schema, (2) aggiungi preferito select + Aggiungi Preferito button. Separated by border-t divider.
ui_verification.control_panel_layout: Rounded border panel with p-2 spacing. Grid-based segmented buttons with consistent sizing (px-2 py-1.5). Active states highlighted with colored backgrounds (amber for Drag lock, blue for Snap).
ui_verification.add_elements_row: '+Tavolo' and '+Stazione' in grid-cols-2 gap-1 layout for horizontal alignment.
ui_verification.ipad_style_usability: Compact controls reduce vertical space. Segmented buttons easier to tap. Visual hierarchy maintained.

playwright_tests.control_panel: All data-testid selectors present: piantina-control-panel, piantina-segmented-core-controls, piantina-segmented-resize-massive, piantina-segmented-resize-selected
playwright_tests.resize_buttons: All 5 resize buttons clickable without errors
